title: write_btor: Part selects of undriven signals are lowered as separate inputs

features.name: undriven wire part select in assertion
features.description: Code should include an undriven wire with a part select used in an assertion that compares the part select to the full wire value

features.name: anyseq wire vs undriven wire semantic difference
features.description: Code should include two equivalent designs where a wire with (* anyseq *) attribute behaves correctly but an undriven wire causes incorrect output in write_btor
features.snippet:
(* anyseq *) wire [1:0] a;
wire [1:0] a; // undriven, causes bug

features.name: concatenation with part select of undriven wire
features.description: Code should include a concatenation operation where one operand is a part select of an undriven wire
